informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.text: We collect account and usage information required to provide the Expenses application. This can include profile details, financial records you create in the app, and technical data needed for authentication and secure access.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.text: We use your information to operate core features such as dashboards, transactions, balances, recurring operations, and reports. We also use limited technical data to maintain service reliability and improve user experience.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.text: Data processing is based on service delivery, legitimate interest in protecting the platform, and your consent when applicable. We only process data that is relevant for these purposes.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.text: We retain your data while your account is active or as needed to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements. You can request account deletion according to applicable regulations.

security.title: Security
security.text: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect your information, including authenticated access controls and secure data handling practices. No system is fully risk-free, but we continuously improve protection measures.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict use of your data, and to request a copy of your personal information. Contact us to submit any privacy-related request.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: If you have questions about this policy or your data, please contact the administrator of this Expenses instance.
